The company's strong performance has been reflected in its stock price, which has risen 14.3% over the past three months. As Apple continues to expand its market share and innovate in key areas, investors can expect the company to maintain its position as a leader in the technology sector. Overall, Apple's growth, profitability, and liquidity metrics paint a positive picture of its financial health.
